install: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile --no-audit --no-fund && pnpm run predeploy && pnpm run build --workspace artifacts/api-server && pnpm run build --workspace artifacts/nextrade && pnpm run build --workspace artifacts/admin-portal
build: pnpm run predeploy && pnpm run build --workspace artifacts/api-server && pnpm run build --workspace artifacts/nextrade && pnpm run build --workspace artifacts/admin-portal
